---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a profile, sink, backend check, or CLI improvement
title: "feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow should spanforge support better?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the command, output, profile, backend behavior, or docs change you want.

## Backend or protocol impact

If this touches OpenTelemetry Collector, Tempo, Jaeger, Zipkin, OTLP, or Zipkin JSON, describe the expected compatibility impact.

## Alternatives considered

List any workarounds or simpler options.
